requirement_topic.en: AZSTAND Mandatory Conformity Certificate — EV Charger Safety (IEC 61851 / AZS / GOST)
requirement_topic.zh: AZSTAND强制合格证书——电动汽车充电设备安全（IEC 61851 / AZS / GOST）
requirement_topic.zht: AZSTAND強制合格證書——電動汽車充電設備安全（IEC 61851 / AZS / GOST）

summary.en: Azerbaijan's national standards body is AZSTAND (Azstandart — Azerbaijan State Agency for Standardization, Metrology and Patents). EV charging equipment placed on the Azerbaijan market requires a mandatory conformity certificate issued under the AZSTAND system. Azerbaijan is NOT a member of the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU), so an EAC certificate issued for the EAEU does not by itself satisfy Azerbaijan conformity requirements and cannot be used as a substitute for AZSTAND conformity assessment. The applicable technical standards are AZS-adopted, GOST-harmonized, or IEC 61851-series standards as referenced in the Azerbaijan mandatory list for electrical equipment. The dossier should address electrical shock protection, insulation, overheating, mechanical hazards, control-pilot logic, protection functions, marking, instructions, and conformity documentation for the exact AC or DC charger configuration.
summary.zh: 阿塞拜疆国家标准机构为AZSTAND（Azstandart——阿塞拜疆国家标准化、计量和专利局）。投放阿塞拜疆市场的电动汽车充电设备需要AZSTAND体系颁发的强制合格证书。阿塞拜疆不是欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员国，因此为EAEU颁发的EAC证书本身不满足阿塞拜疆合格评定要求，不能作为AZSTAND合格评定的替代。适用技术标准为AZS采标、GOST协调或IEC 61851系列标准，按阿塞拜疆电气设备强制目录中的引用执行。资料包应覆盖具体交流或直流充电设备配置的防触电、绝缘、过热、机械危险、控制导引逻辑、保护功能、标识、说明书和合格证明文件。
summary.zht: 亞塞拜疆國家標準機構為AZSTAND（Azstandart——亞塞拜疆國家標準化、計量和專利局）。投放亞塞拜疆市場的電動汽車充電設備需要AZSTAND體系頒發的強制合格證書。亞塞拜疆不是歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員國，因此為EAEU頒發的EAC證書本身不滿足亞塞拜疆合格評定要求，不能作為AZSTAND合格評定的替代。適用技術標準為AZS採標、GOST協調或IEC 61851系列標準，按亞塞拜疆電氣設備強制目錄中的引用執行。資料包應覆蓋具體交流或直流充電設備配置的防觸電、絕緣、過熱、機械危險、控制導引邏輯、保護功能、標識、說明書和合格證明文件。

standards_or_laws: AZSTAND (Azstandart) mandatory conformity certification for electrical equipment
IEC 61851-1: General requirements for EV conductive charging systems
AZS / GOST standards harmonized with IEC 61851 where adopted by Azerbaijan
Azerbaijan law on technical regulation and standardization

summary.en: Chinese EV charger safety evidence commonly includes GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 18487.2 where applicable, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication where applicable, factory safety tests, CB or IEC reports, and component certificates. This evidence can support the AZSTAND dossier by demonstrating safety design intent, but it is not an AZSTAND conformity certificate or declaration by itself. An EAC certificate for Kazakhstan or Russia does not extend to Azerbaijan.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备安全证据通常包括GB/T 18487.1-2023、适用时的GB/T 18487.2、适用时的GB/T 27930-2023直流通信、工厂安全测试、CB或IEC报告以及部件证书。这些证据可通过展示安全设计意图来支持AZSTAND资料包，但本身不是AZSTAND合格证书或声明。针对哈萨克斯坦或俄罗斯的EAC证书不延伸至阿塞拜疆。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備安全證據通常包括GB/T 18487.1-2023、適用時的GB/T 18487.2、適用時的GB/T 27930-2023直流通訊、工廠安全測試、CB或IEC報告以及部件證書。這些證據可通過展示安全設計意圖來支持AZSTAND資料包，但本身不是AZSTAND合格證書或聲明。針對哈薩克斯坦或俄羅斯的EAC證書不延伸至亞塞拜疆。

gap.en: Confirm product scope, voltage rating, charger type (AC wallbox, AC pedestal, DC fast charger), and AZSTAND conformity route before shipment. Prepare Azerbaijani-language labels and manuals where required, safety risk analysis, bill of materials, IEC 61851 crosswalk evidence, test reports, conformity certificate route documents, and authorized local representative documentation. Do NOT rely on an EAC certificate as a substitute — Azerbaijan requires its own AZSTAND conformity assessment.
gap.zh: 出货前应确认产品范围、电压等级、充电设备类型（交流壁挂、交流立柱、直流快充）和AZSTAND合规路径。应在被要求时准备阿塞拜疆语标签和手册、安全风险分析、物料清单、IEC 61851交叉映射证据、测试报告、合格证书路径文件和授权本地代表文件。不得将EAC证书作为替代——阿塞拜疆要求自己的AZSTAND合格评定。
gap.zht: 出貨前應確認產品範圍、電壓等級、充電設備類型（交流壁掛、交流立柱、直流快充）和AZSTAND合規路徑。應在被要求時準備亞塞拜疆語標籤和手冊、安全風險分析、物料清單、IEC 61851交叉映射證據、測試報告、合格證書路徑文件和授權本地代表文件。不得將EAC證書作為替代——亞塞拜疆要求自己的AZSTAND合格評定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory: AZSTAND conformity certificate required for EV charging equipment placed on the Azerbaijan market; EAC certification does not substitute
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or procurement-specific depending on Chinese product category, charger configuration, and project route

source.publisher: AZSTAND (Azstandart — Azerbaijan State Agency for Standardization, Metrology and Patents)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China GB/T safety evidence supports technical review, but Azerbaijan market placement requires an AZSTAND mandatory conformity certificate. An EAC certificate for EAEU markets does not cover Azerbaijan.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T安全证据可支持技术审查，但阿塞拜疆市场投放需要AZSTAND强制合格证书。面向EAEU市场的EAC证书不覆盖阿塞拜疆。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T安全證據可支持技術審查，但亞塞拜疆市場投放需要AZSTAND強制合格證書。面向EAEU市場的EAC證書不覆蓋亞塞拜疆。
